meaning: n.一口淡酒,小争吵,小口角,酒vi.小争吵,生气vt.饮
examples: First I'll show how to write a TIFF file out.
Reading TIFF files reliably is much harder than writing them.
Then I'll show how to read a TIFF file back into your program.
The staff was friendly, despite one minor tiff over an unexpected charge (settled favorably).
The tiff exposes two fallacies that come from looking at a globalised industry through national spectacles.
